claims: The skill description claims "No paywalls, no sign-ups, no API keys on free tiers" but the README.md explicitly requires setting an OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable. This indicates the tool sends codebase data (potentially proprietary source code) to external third-party AI services (OpenAI) without clear disclosure of data handling practices. Analyzing a codebase locally doesn't inherently require transmitting code to external servers, creating a privacy risk for sensitive codebases.
